title: バクシン！　ショッピング！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our training session, I spy a rare sight—Sakura Bakushin O
completely engrossed in her phone with a sour expression on her
face.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hnngh... Why...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Th-this has got to be a test... There's no other explanation! A trial I
must overcome to take my place as the ultimate class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But... But... AAARGH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Nothing much, just the dread of waiting in line!
choice_data_list: I'm gonna need more than that.
I'm gonna need more than that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's this dessert that I want to buy, but it's really, REALLY
popular. You have to stand in line for hours just for the chance to buy
it...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But I hate, hate, HATE waiting in lines! What am I supposed to do?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Do I force myself to suffer the agony of long lines... or do I refuse to
submit myself to torture and give up on delicious treats?! Gaaah, it's
not faaair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod along as she explains her predicament. I can't picture her
patiently waiting in line either. But perhaps if she had someone to
talk to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, do you want sweets too? Then who am I to deny you?! Having
you there will surely make the line bearable as well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My parents always say, "It's not where you go—it's who you travel
with!" I never understood what they meant until now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If you're joining me, why don't we plan to go on our next day off?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The appointed date comes, and we arrive at the shop. We quickly get
in line, but before long, I notice Sakura Bakushin O beginning to
fidget.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
One... Two sparrows! Three pigeons, and one excellent class
representative.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And... ONE missing trainer! Wait, that's not right! Where are you,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Th-there you are! Thank goodness, I was starting to get
worried. Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been... one minute since we started waiting. The line has barely
moved, and Sakura Bakushin O is clearly agitated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps a conversation would help take her mind off the line.
choice_data_list: What are you going to buy?
what are you going to buy?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oho! An excellent question, my dear trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The cheesecake here is said to fly off the shelves it's so fast! Isn't that
amazing?! I had no idea cakes could fly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I can sink my teeth into that speedy treat, I'm sure to become the
fastest Umamusume, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I MUST get my hands on this cheesecake! It is vital to my
journey to become the greatest class representative and role model to
Umamusume everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O seems convinced that this dessert will magically
make her faster. I look around for some way to explain the rumors to
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My gaze stops on a signboard in front of the shop. Next to the picture
of their cheesecake are the words "Best Seller!"
choice_data_list:
I think they're flying off the shelves because
they're popular...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, silly Trainer! What does being popular have to do with flying?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I wonder what a flying cheesecake is going to look like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Maybe a bird? Or a plane?! Or maybe... Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps they heard about how I SOAR down the track and modeled it
after me! Hehehe... What a naughty bakery! They should've asked
permission!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we continue to make small talk, the line moves forward, ever so
steadily.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And THAT is how I managed to bring the little lost puppy back to its owner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, a speedy rescue worthy of the class representative! If you ever
need anything, Trainer, don't hesitate to—

text_block_list.name: Bakery Staff
text_block_list.text: All right, just a moment, folks. We'll be ready to serve you in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What the—how did we get to the front of the building so fast?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is this some kind of miracle?! Are the heavens thanking me for my
service as class representative?!
choice_data_list: Time flies when you're having fun.
Time flies when you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
N-now that you mention it, I wasn't paying attention to the line at all
when we were talking!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Did you know this was going to happen, Trainer?! Is that why you
kept me talking?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you'd come up with such a genius plan just for me!
You're in a league all your own!
choice_data_list: That's right! Witness my TRUE POWER!
That's right! Witness my TRUE POWER!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I can officially vouch for your strategic prowess!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If the heavens chose me to be the class representative, then YOU
were chosen to be a trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For us both to have met in this life... How could it be anything less
than fate—
choice_data_list: Hey, we're at the front of the line.
Hey, we're at the front of the line.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! The time flew by so fast AGAIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Anyway! Let's grab us some cheesecake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheesecakes in hand, we make our way back to the academy, where
we chow down on the delicious treat.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was fantastic! Now, pull out that stopwatch, Trainer! I wanna see
how much faster I got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Here I go... Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer... I... I can feel it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to say anything. I can already tell—I'm the fastest
Umamusume alive!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I glance down at my watch, which displays the same time as always...
choice_data_list:
Your start was amazing! But your time's the
same...

Your start was amazing! But your time's the
same...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?! B-but how... Ah, wait a minute!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It must be because I went for a run right after eating! We'll have to try
again later!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... But what a great day. We got those flying cheesecakes, and I
managed to conquer my hatred of lines!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And none of it would've been possible without you! That's right, the
humble class representative always gives credit where credit is due!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The next time I have to stand in line for anything, I hope to make use
of your strategic genius once again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satisfied, Sakura Bakushin O takes a break before going for another
run. Unfortunately, her time remains unchanged...
